feed.title: minneapolisbankruptcy.org -- Bankruptcy Information
feed.subtitle: Free bankruptcy information and guides from the Open Bankruptcy Project

entry.title: Minneapolis Bankruptcy -- Chapter 7 & 13 Filing Guide [2026]
entry.summary: Free Minneapolis bankruptcy guide for 2026. Compare Chapter 7 vs Chapter 13, local exemptions, filing costs, means test, and what to expect in your case.

entry.title: The Automatic Stay in Minneapolis Bankruptcy
entry.summary: Learn how the automatic stay protects Minneapolis residents when filing bankruptcy.

entry.title: Bank Account and Bankruptcy in Minneapolis
entry.summary: How bankruptcy affects your bank account in Minneapolis. Protecting funds, bank freezes, exemptions, and what Minnesota filers need to know.

entry.title: Can I Buy a Car While in Chapter 13? -- Minneapolis
entry.summary: You need trustee approval and a court motion to purchase a vehicle during Chapter 13. [Minneapolis]

entry.title: Buying a House After Bankruptcy in Minneapolis
entry.summary: When and how to buy a house after bankruptcy in Minneapolis. FHA, VA, USDA waiting periods and credit rebuilding for Minnesota homebuyers.

entry.title: Car Leases and Bankruptcy -- Minneapolis
entry.summary: You have 60 days after filing to decide whether to assume (keep) or reject (surrender) your car lease. [Minneapolis]

entry.title: Chapter 13 Eligibility in Minneapolis | Requirements & Debt Limits
entry.summary: Chapter 13 eligibility in Minneapolis. Debt limits, income requirements, and qualification criteria for Minnesota filers in the District of Minnesota.

entry.title: Chapter 13 Payments in Minneapolis | How Much Will You Pay?
entry.summary: How Chapter 13 plan payments are calculated in Minneapolis. Disposable income, best interest test, payment timeline for District of Minnesota filers.

entry.title: Chapter 13 Bankruptcy in Minneapolis -- Payment Plans, Dismissal Rates, Timeline
entry.summary: Guide to Chapter 13 bankruptcy in Minneapolis. Payment plan basics, D. Minn. dismissal rate (35.4%), timeline, 3-5 year commitment, and what to expect.

entry.title: Chapter 7 Eligibility in Minneapolis | Means Test & Requirements
entry.summary: Find out if you qualify for Chapter 7 bankruptcy in Minneapolis. Means test thresholds, income limits, and requirements for Minnesota filers.
